name: Fat Pocket Pawn
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in North Versailles, PA buying, selling, and trading jewelry, guns, tools, electronics, and collectibles with over 10 years of experience.
description_long:
Fat Pocket Pawn is a family-owned pawn shop operating in North Versailles, Pennsylvania, with over a decade of experience in the collateral lending and goods resale industry. The business operates as a traditional pawn operation, serving the local community through buy, sell, and trade services.

The company offers a straightforward three-step buy and sell process: customers bring items for evaluation, receive a price quote based on assessed value, and if terms are agreed upon, complete the transaction and receive cash. They explicitly advertise free price estimates and welcome customers to call for pawn loan inquiries. Their inventory spans jewelry, coins, guns, tools, electronics, and collectibles—a typical pawn shop range.

Fat Pocket Pawn distinguishes itself through its family ownership model and stated longevity in the market. They provide free estimates, maintain accessible business hours (weekdays 10am-6pm, Saturday 10am-2pm), and offer multiple contact methods (phone, text, email). The business complies with age verification requirements, requiring customers to be 18+ with valid state-issued ID for transactions.

As a pawn shop, this business primarily serves consumers who need quick cash against collateral or who are looking to purchase secondhand goods at potentially lower prices than retail. Like all pawn operations, customers should understand that pawn loans involve surrendering possession of items as collateral, and failure to repay results in forfeiture. The website provides limited detail about loan terms, interest rates, or repayment periods—information critical to evaluating the true cost of borrowing through this channel.
address: 365 Lincoln Hwy, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

company_info.headquarters: 365 Lincoln Hwy, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

pros: Family-owned business with over 10 years of operating experience
Free price quotes and estimates available by phone, text, or email
Wide inventory across multiple categories (jewelry, coins, guns, tools, electronics, collectibles)
Accessible business hours including Saturday operation (10am-2pm)
Multiple contact methods (phone, text, email) for customer convenience
Clear three-step buy and sell process outlined on website
Complies with age verification and valid ID requirements for legal protection
cons: Website provides no details on loan terms, interest rates, APR, or repayment periods—critical information for borrowers
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays; Friday closes at 6pm) may not suit all customer schedules
No online valuation tool or pricing transparency available; customers must visit in person or call for quotes
404 error on 'about' page suggests incomplete or poorly maintained web presence
No information about what happens if loan terms cannot be met or details on item redemption process
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash and willing to use personal items as collateral
Buyers seeking secondhand jewelry, tools, guns, electronics, or collectibles at discount prices
People in the North Versailles, PA area with limited access to traditional credit options
Individuals looking to sell or trade items for immediate cash payment
diagnosis: Fat Pocket Pawn is best for local consumers in North Versailles, PA who need emergency cash and have valuable items to use as collateral, or those seeking to buy secondhand goods. The critical caveat is that the website completely lacks transparency on loan terms, interest rates, and fees—borrowers must contact the shop directly to understand the true cost of any pawn loan before committing.
services: Pawn loans against collateral (jewelry, guns, tools, electronics, collectibles)
Purchase of used jewelry and coins
Purchase of used firearms and gun-related items
Item trade-in (customer brings item, receives trade value toward purchase)
Free price quotes and item evaluations
